name: Lasagna Sarde with Lobster, Tomatoes and Saffron
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium red onion, julienne into 1/8 inch strips
2 Ribs celery, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
1 Medium potato, diced into 1/8 inch cubes
1/2 Pound overripe tomatoes, diced into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove lobster from shells and cut into 1/4-inch pieces.
2. Bring 6 quarts of water to a boil and add 2 tablespoons salt.
3. In a 12 to 14-inch saute pan, heat olive oil until smoking.
4. Add onion, celery, potato, and garlic; saute until golden brown.
5. Add tomatoes, wine, and saffron; bring to a boil.
6. Lower heat and simmer for 1 minute.
7. Cook pasta according to package instructions and drain.
8. Add lobster to tomato sauce in pan and toss through.
9. Add hot pasta to pan and add chives.
10. Toss to coat and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
